channel.title: Nika · Notes from the source
channel.description: Long-form pedagogy on Intent as Code: why useful AI work belongs in a file, why the language locks at four verbs, and what local-first actually buys you.

item.title: The trace you can replay
item.description: Every run leaves a flight recorder: a deterministic AI audit trail you can replay like a film, never re-execute by accident.

item.title: No cloud needed
item.description: One Rust binary, your models, your files. Run LLMs locally and see what local-first actually buys you.

item.title: The plan you get for free
item.description: depends_on is all you write. The orchestration falls out of the graph: parallel waves, drawn before anything runs.

item.title: Four verbs are enough
item.description: A verb is a distinct execution model, not a feature. Why the language locks at four, forever.

item.title: Intent as Code: why your AI work should be a file
item.description: Chats evaporate, files compound. The case for writing AI work down as source you own: your best prompts, versioned like code.

item.title: The blast radius is part of the file
item.description: permits: is the whole list, guardrails an agent can't talk past. Everything not on it is denied before it runs, with a named error.

item.title: A standard library, not a plugin store
item.description: 23 builtins in the binary, allow-listed, nothing to install. The library grows, the language holds still.

item.title: An open spec, a copyleft engine
item.description: Two licenses, one argument: the file must outlive every vendor, including us.

item.title: Starting over, on purpose
item.description: We had a working prototype. We rebuilt from scratch anyway: craft, not extraction, one gate at a time.

item.title: Naming the drum
item.description: Why a workflow engine carries the name of a liberation god, and a butterfly on every commit.

item.title: The note that started it
item.description: Before the spec, before the name, there was one evening note: the best AI work of the month had just disappeared.
